name: jira-time-tracker-ext
description: Chrome extension for logging and tracking Jira time.

scripts.package: npm run build && rm -f jira-time-tracker-ext.zip ../jira-time-tracker-ext.zip && zip -r ../jira-time-tracker-ext.zip manifest.json dist src/icons src/content-script.css
scripts.ci:check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run build
